summary: Test suite covers basic matrix generation logic but misses critical requirements: (1) No CLI tests despite cli.ts being the main entry point; (2) No workflow structure validation tests despite task requiring actionlint checks and workflow path verification; (3) No error case tests for empty/null OS or language arrays, despite code explicitly validating these; (4) No integration tests validating execution through act despite task mandate "ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT"; (5) Test 8 misleadingly named "missing optional arrays" but doesn't test missing arrays. Task explicitly requires workflow validation, actionlint execution, and act integration testing—none present in bun test suite. Tests are readable and well-organized but lack fixtures, helper functions, and don't demonstrate TDD methodology. Would miss regressions in CLI, workflow, and error handling paths.
